utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (July 1–5, 2024), transportation (flight details with cost €360), accommodation (hotel and cost €400), activities (three activities each with costs €60, €110, €60), additional_services (only a description of pre-registration, but no explicit cost), and total_budget (€930 total). All items except additional_services are fully specified with required details and costs. The additional_services item lacks a cost, so it is incomplete. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully covered.
